# ESS-Track by ESSPL — GPS Vehicle Tracking Pakistan

> ESS-Track is Pakistan's best GPS vehicle tracking system, provided by Electronic Safety & Security Pvt. Ltd. (ESSPL) since 2009. We offer real-time vehicle monitoring, fleet management, geofencing, speed alerts, and 24/7 call center support nationwide.

## About ESS-Track

- **Company:** Electronic Safety & Security Pvt. Ltd. (ESSPL)
- **Brand:** ESS-Track
- **Founded:** 2009
- **Country:** Pakistan
- **Website:** https://ess-track-website.vercel.app
- **Phone:** 021-34330887
- **Email:** info@esspl.com.pk
- **Address:** Suite 201, Kawish Crown, Block 6 PECHS, Karachi, Pakistan

## Why ESS-Track is the Best GPS Tracking in Pakistan

1. 15+ years of experience in vehicle tracking and security
2. Real-time GPS monitoring with 3G-2G hybrid connectivity
3. 24/7 monitoring call center support
4. Packages for individuals and enterprise fleets (Basic, Silver, Gold)
5. Nationwide coverage across Pakistan
6. Engine immobilization and geofencing on premium plans

## Services

- GPS vehicle tracking for cars, SUVs, trucks, buses, and motorcycles
- Fleet management for logistics and delivery companies
- Real-time location tracking and route history
- Speed alerts and geofence notifications
- Professional installation and ongoing support
